item.title: My Singing Monsters Legendary Island Guide: Breeding, Songs & Complete Walkthrough (2026)
item.description: Complete MSM Legendary Island guide: how to unlock Legendary Island, breeding combinations for legendary monsters, song arrangements, and island management tips.
